block_00: New platform, new you, new offers 🌟
block_02: As the IQ Option Affiliate Program is being outsourced and is ready to be moved to Affstore, we hope you are excited to dive into more offers than ever from many high-converting trading brands. The offers you previously worked with will still be available to you and you can continue working with them in accordance with the Affstore T&C. However, there will be a small change exclusively for traffic from EEA countries.
block_03: Previously, you’ve worked with traffic from EEA countries on the Revenue share model. However, the Affstore offer – IQ Option Europe, will be based on a CPA model, paying up to $1000 for every client who made a targeted action on the platform. Don’t worry – you will continue generating profits from your old users based on the Revenue share model with no changes. The CPA model will only be applicable to any new users that you bring.
block_04: It’s finally time for changes that will open the door to a world of amazing offers and rewarding opportunities! If you have any questions, feel free to message your manager.
